title: JavaFX HBox
summary: The JavaFX HBox control is a layout control which lays out its child nodes next to each other on a horizontal row. The JavaFX HBox tutorial has been updated with information about child node margins plus the hgrow and fillHeight properties.
content: The JavaFX HBox control is a layout control which lays out its child nodes next to each other on a horizontal row. The JavaFX HBox tutorial has been updated with information about child node margins plus the hgrow and fillHeight properties.
